text_block_list.text:
On the morning of the race, every news outlet is
reporting on a single topic.

"Narita Brian Wins Derby, Closes in on Triple
Crown."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's the same story everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We can't let her steal all the thunder. Well, I
guess I'll have my chance soon enough.
Flash! Flash!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the Takarazuka Kinen press
conference. Please raise your hand if you'd like to
ask a question.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Yes! Over here, please!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Second row from the front, fourth seat in. Go
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Hello, I'm with the Daily Turf. Narita Brian took
home her second crown the other day. Can you
tell us how you feel about your younger sister's
recent successes?
Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
We'd like to ask you to please limit your
questions to those concerning the Takarazuka
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I can take this one. I was expecting
to get this question.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is where the best senior
Umamusume showcase their skills. I want you all
to know that I'll be taking home first.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm here not only to set the stage to compete
against my sister—I'm here to rise through the
ranks and become the best of my generation.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Wait, can it be?
So, she really plans to...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I will beat Narita Brian within the year.
Chatter, murmur...

Biwa Hayahide sets the press room on fire with
that declaration.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I need you to change tomorrow's headline!
Yeah, Hayahide just dropped a bombshell!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Miss Hayahide! Would you mind going
into more detail about what you just said?

All eyes are on Biwa Hayahide as she completely
steals the spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect the press conference to run so
late...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I'm glad I was able to say everything I had to
say. All that's left is for me to put everything out
there at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Anything less than first place isn't
going to cut it this time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do some light exercise to round out
the night. Don't worry—I won't overwork myself.

Biwa Hayahide dashes off, the very picture of
quiet confidence. It's amazing how strong she's
become.

There are still a few things left to do before she
can take on the Takarazuka Kinen in the best
shape possible.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Excuse me, do you happen to be Biwa
Hayahide's trainer by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is great! Do you have a moment right
now? If you don't mind, I'd love to interview—

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, may I join in as well? Perhaps we
could do a joint interview!

Even though the press conference is supposed to
be over, the reporters bombard us with questions
well into the night.

But they must've done their research. They're
bound to have a ton of information on the other
runners.
choice_data_list:
(This is a great opportunity to gather data for
the Takarazuka Kinen!)

text_block_list.text:
I turn on my computer to start putting together
Biwa Hayahide's training schedule.
Whirrr...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has taken the lead! Her opponents
may be the finest racers out there, but she's not
giving up her spot, folks!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's still pulling away! Look at that
unbelievable speed! She's done it! She's won the
Japanese Derby, and she made it look easy!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Bri-an! Bri-an! Bri-an!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Listen to that crowd! Here she is—Narita Brian, a
beast of a runner and the greatest Umamusume of
all time!

A video of Narita Brian's performance at the
Japanese Derby plays on my screen.

Her rate of improvement is uncanny—scary even.
It's unbelievable how she manages to keep
getting better.
